toolbar_import_word: Import a song from text file
playlist_transpose_up: Transpose playlist item half note higher (Alt+Up)
playlist_transpose_down: Transpose playlist item half note lower (Alt+Down)
playlist_capo_up: Raise recommended capo value of playlist item
playlist_capo_down: Lower recommended capo value of playlist item
editor_transpose_up: Transpose all chords a half note higher
editor_transpose_down: Transpose all chords a half note lower
song_filter: Filter songs by title or content
songtree:
Browse and search your song library.
Select a song to load it in the editor.
Double-click a song to add it to the playlist and project it immediately.
Right-click for more options.
playlist:
Click to select and project a song.
Drag to reorder.
Right-click for transpose, capo and more options.
sectionlist:
Click to project the section.
Colors indicate current/next section
and whether the section fits on the screen with current settings.
* Enter - jump to next section
* Arrows - move next section up/down
* Page keys - switch song block
* Backspace - jump to beginning of song block
* Esc - clear selection
preview_no_qrcode:
Click to show a QR code on the projected display.
Viewers can scan it with their phone
to follow along on their own screen.
preview_qrcode: Drag to move · Scroll to resize · Click to hide
